# StarRay Hotel

> Multilingual website for StarRay Hotel Group Indonesia, covering brand positioning, projects, partnerships, and booking updates.

## Canonical site
- https://www.starrayhotel.com/

## Language routes
- English home: https://www.starrayhotel.com/
- Chinese home: https://www.starrayhotel.com/zh/
- Indonesian home: https://www.starrayhotel.com/id/
- English booking: https://www.starrayhotel.com/booking/
- Chinese booking: https://www.starrayhotel.com/zh/booking/
- Indonesian booking: https://www.starrayhotel.com/id/booking/

## Core facts
- StarRay Hotel is a hotel branding and operating platform focused on Indonesia.
- Brand positioning: Certainty in the City.
- Current operating hotels: 2.
- Current rooms: 256.
- Representative project: IKN Mixed-use Project, Nusantara.
- Contact email: Bill.lin@starrayhotel.com

## Main sections
- About Us
- Brand
- Competitive / operating advantages
- Projects
- Partnership & Contact
- Booking (coming soon)
